creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
OK, so I don't know how, but you have the wrong MD5 checksum for the file here. 
  It should be a50fff6bc1e1542451722e2650cb53b4, and that's the MD5 checksum in 
FreeBSD's ports tree CVS.  I did submit a patch which incorrectly had the above 
checksum, but that part of the patch was not committed.  Those last 3 lines in 
distinfo should be this:

MD5 (mingw/w32api-3.13-mingw32-dev.tar.gz) = a50fff6bc1e1542451722e2650cb53b4
SHA256 (mingw/w32api-3.13-mingw32-dev.tar.gz) = 
7dbf01a06a0e21bd405fc397789bdbfdd21e69acb59383568a3d96ea1b1455a6
SIZE (mingw/w32api-3.13-mingw32-dev.tar.gz) = 1634605

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
